TextView.android:text:
Healthy recipes are meals made with nutritious ingredients that provide essential nutrients, support good health, and help maintain a balanced diet.

 🍎Apple
 Apples are rich in fiber and vitamin C. They support heart health, aid digestion, and make a healthy snack. 

 🥕Carrot
 Carrots are an excellent source of vitamin A, which helps maintain healthy eyesight and supports the immune system.

 🍌Banana
 Bananas provide potassium, which helps keep muscles and the heart healthy. They are a great source of natural energy. 

 🥩Meat Products
Meat products are rich in protein and essential nutrients that help build muscles, support growth, and provide energy.
